name: General Check-ups
description: Routine health examinations to assess overall wellness and identify potential health concerns early.

name: Annual Physical Examinations
description: Comprehensive yearly physical exam including vital signs, health history review, and preventive care recommendations.

name: Vaccinations and Immunizations
description: Various vaccines including flu shots, COVID-19, tetanus, and travel vaccinations.

name: Lab Work and Testing
description: Blood work, urine tests, and other laboratory services for diagnostic purposes.

name: Specialist Referrals
description: Coordination of care with specialists in cardiology, dermatology, orthopedics, and more.

name: Telehealth Consultations
description: Virtual appointments for follow-ups, minor illnesses, medication refills, and health questions.

name: Prescription Refills
description: Quick prescription refills for ongoing medications. Please have your prescription bottle ready.

name: Women's Health
description: Women's wellness exams, Pap smears, breast health screenings, and menopause management.

name: Men's Health
description: Men's wellness exams, prostate screenings, and cardiovascular health assessments.

name: Pediatric Care
description: Healthcare services for children from newborns to adolescents, including well-child visits.
